source_pr.title: store/tikv:move option from kv to tikv, and make define as a normal int
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: AndreMouche

### What problem does this PR solve?
This PR move the definition of Option from kv to tikv since it is only used in tikv. Also we redefined Option as a normal int, in case other kv engines would use it in the future.
Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

symptoms: + // Move this test to here to avoid race test. | result, err = s.execQuery(tk, "select key_name, clustered from information_schema.tidb_indexes where table_name = 'tr' order by key_name") (ddl/db_change_test.go)
failure_signature: + // Move this test to here to avoid race test. | result, err = s.execQuery(tk, "select key_name, clustered from information_schema.tidb_indexes where table_name = 'tr' order by key_name") (ddl/db_change_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The PR is a large refactor/movement of TiKV option definitions and touches a very wide surface area. The captured evidence line is a comment about moving a test to avoid race tests, but the case metadata (e.g., test path/name) does not clearly align with a specific targeted stabilization change in the patch. Without a concrete flaky failure signature that ties to a narrow fix, we conservatively mark this case as needing more evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
